result.reason: RDP sessions fail after opening multiple connections, suggesting a resource leak or improper session management.
result.approach: Investigate RDP session lifecycle, focusing on resource allocation and deallocation within RdpProtocol.cs and ConnectionsService.cs. Ensure proper disposal of AxMSTSCLib controls and verify no static references prevent garbage collection. Analyze how RDP controls are embedded and removed from UI components, likely FrmMain.cs or related controls.
